goal: A 2D fighting game, single screen: two large high-resolution detailed fighters facing each other, player (blue gi) vs a red-gi opponent controlled by the computer. Health bars at top; a round ends when one fighter's health reaches zero with a dramatic death; R restarts; fighters always face each other.
